item.title: The Most Powerful Moments From The 2026 Memorial Day Parade
item.description: The Most Powerful Moments From The 2026 Memorial Day Parade #army #veterans

media:content.media:title: The Most Powerful Moments From The 2026 Memorial Day Parade
media:content.media:description: The Most Powerful Moments From The 2026 Memorial Day Parade #army #veterans

item.title: Corpsman Earns Three Purple Hearts in Vietnam
item.description: A Vietnam corpsman is recognized for saving Marines and earning three Purple Hearts through repeated acts of courage and service.

media:content.media:title: Corpsman Earns Three Purple Hearts in Vietnam
media:content.media:description: A Vietnam corpsman is recognized for saving Marines and earning three Purple Hearts through repeated acts of courage and service.

item.title: Navy Corpsmen: Courage Under Fire
item.description: On the Navy Hospital Corps anniversary, we honor Corpsmen’s service. Medal of Honor recipient Robert Ingram recalls treating wounded Marines in Vietnam.

media:content.media:title: Navy Corpsmen: Courage Under Fire
media:content.media:description: On the Navy Hospital Corps anniversary, we honor Corpsmen’s service. Medal of Honor recipient Robert Ingram recalls treating wounded Marines in Vietnam.

item.title: How a Ham Saved a WWII Soldier's Life
item.description: A WWII veteran recalls how an unexpected ham helped save his life, offering a brief firsthand reflection on survival and wartime experience.

media:content.media:title: How a Ham Saved a WWII Soldier's Life
media:content.media:description: A WWII veteran recalls how an unexpected ham helped save his life, offering a brief firsthand reflection on survival and wartime experience.

item.title: A Veteran’s Family Message to Thousands
item.description: A veteran’s family shared a powerful message with thousands, reflecting on service, sacrifice, and the lasting bonds of military life.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran’s Family Message to Thousands
media:content.media:description: A veteran’s family shared a powerful message with thousands, reflecting on service, sacrifice, and the lasting bonds of military life.

item.title: John Allen’s Path from SEAL to Storyteller
item.description: Before millions knew him as MrBallen, John Allen served as a Navy SEAL. He reflects on service, sacrifice, and the experiences that shaped his storytelling.

media:content.media:title: John Allen’s Path from SEAL to Storyteller
media:content.media:description: Before millions knew him as MrBallen, John Allen served as a Navy SEAL. He reflects on service, sacrifice, and the experiences that shaped his storytelling.

item.title: A Veteran’s Wartime Survival Story
item.description: A firsthand veteran account reflecting on wartime survival, courage, and the choices made under fire.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran’s Wartime Survival Story
media:content.media:description: A firsthand veteran account reflecting on wartime survival, courage, and the choices made under fire.

item.title: First Wave Landing at Omaha Beach
item.description: A firsthand account of landing in the first wave on Omaha Beach on D-Day, reflecting on courage, service, and the historic invasion.

media:content.media:title: First Wave Landing at Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of landing in the first wave on Omaha Beach on D-Day, reflecting on courage, service, and the historic invasion.

item.title: Fallujah Veteran Reflects on Combat Orders
item.description: A veteran reflects on the rules of engagement in Fallujah and the realities of combat, offering a firsthand military history perspective.

media:content.media:title: Fallujah Veteran Reflects on Combat Orders
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on the rules of engagement in Fallujah and the realities of combat, offering a firsthand military history perspective.

item.title: Patton and the Rhine River Story
item.description: A brief historical account tied to General Patton and the Rhine River, presented in a respectful, documentary style.

media:content.media:title: Patton and the Rhine River Story
media:content.media:description: A brief historical account tied to General Patton and the Rhine River, presented in a respectful, documentary style.

item.title: Surviving 6 Years in Vietnam Captivity
item.description: A veteran reflects on surviving six years of captivity in Vietnam, sharing a firsthand account of endurance, service, and survival.

media:content.media:title: Surviving 6 Years in Vietnam Captivity
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on surviving six years of captivity in Vietnam, sharing a firsthand account of endurance, service, and survival.
